displayName: Auth Hardening: Migrations, RBAC, Code Fixes, Tests

decisions.rationale: Without these, refresh_tokens table, admin seed user, and member_id FK don't exist in production. Login/refresh will fail.

decisions.decision: Add @PreAuthorize annotations per controller class or method
decisions.rationale: Consistent with existing pattern in LoanBatchController, DashboardController, UserManagementController. Per-controller is more explicit and auditable than centralized URL patterns.
Members should view their own data. Admin manages member lifecycle. Treasurer needs read access for financial operations.
Treasurer records contributions. Members view their own. Category management is admin-only config.

decisions.decision: PayoutController: create/approve=ADMIN,TREASURER; process=ADMIN,TREASURER; reads=ADMIN,TREASURER,MEMBER. CashDisbursement/BankWithdrawal/ShareWithdrawal: writes=ADMIN,TREASURER; reads=ADMIN,TREASURER,MEMBER
decisions.rationale: Financial operations need treasurer or admin. Members can view their own payout history.
Ledger is internal accounting. Only admin and treasurer should access journal entries and account balances.
Audit trail is admin-only. Sensitive operational data.
System configuration (loan products, schedules, penalties) is admin-only.

decisions.decision: No changes needed — DashboardController already has @PreAuthorize. ExportController: ADMIN,TREASURER
decisions.rationale: Dashboard is already secured. Export endpoints should match dashboard access.

decisions.decision: Fix SecurityConfig JSON string interpolation by escaping exception messages
decisions.rationale: REVIEW.md warning: authException.getMessage() in String.format can produce malformed JSON if message contains quotes.

decisions.decision: Use generic error message in refresh endpoint instead of e.getMessage()
decisions.rationale: REVIEW.md warning: leaks internal error details. Login endpoint already uses static messages.

decisions.decision: Remove unused OAuth2 config properties from application.yml
decisions.rationale: oauth2.client.web-app.secret and oauth2.client.batch-client.secret are dead config after removing AuthorizationServerConfig.

decisions.decision: Add unit tests for AuthService, JwtService, MeController, UserAdminController
decisions.rationale: Project requires unit tests for all service implementations and controllers. These 4 new components have zero test coverage.

constraints: Must not break existing @PreAuthorize annotations in LoanBatchController, LoanBenefitController, DashboardController
Must not modify already-applied Liquibase changesets (only register them in master)
Member self-service (viewing own data) requires IDOR protection — defer to follow-up if complex
@EnableMethodSecurity already present in SecurityConfig — no config change needed for @PreAuthorize
Modules that don't depend on spring-security need the dependency added to their pom.xml for @PreAuthorize
Controller tests using @WebMvcTest will need security config adjusted (@WithMockUser or SecurityMockMvcConfigurers)
openQuestions: Should MEMBER role access be restricted to own data (IDOR protection) or deferred to a follow-up? Recommendation: add class-level @PreAuthorize for role gating now, defer per-resource IDOR checks to a separate feature.
Should ExportController in sacco-reporting get @PreAuthorize? Currently no annotations. Recommendation: yes, ADMIN,TREASURER.
